# Whitepaper brief — Canadian CDMO operating model

**Status: shipped.** The 10-page PDF is generated by `apps/web/scripts/generate-whitepaper.mjs` and lives at `/public/downloads/canadian-cdmo-operating-model.pdf`. Brief retained as historical context for the next iteration or Sanity migration.

---

## Title

**"The Canadian CDMO operating model: how a Health Canada DEL site and an offshore development centre operate under one quality system"**

Earlier working titles (retired):
- "Inside a Canada-India CDMO" — retired in PR #19
- "The two-hub operating model" — retired in the Canadian-anchored rebrand follow-up to PR #23

## One-line positioning

A field guide for innovator and generic sponsors evaluating CDMO partners that operate a Canadian DEL site with offshore analytical and development depth under one quality system. Propharmex is a Canadian pharmaceutical services company; the operating geography is internal, not a productized intermediary role.

## Target personas (ranked)

1. **VP / Head of CMC** at a mid-size US or EU innovator planning Canadian + US + EU launches
2. **VP / Head of Manufacturing** at a US generic manufacturer consolidating CDMO footprint
3. **Director of Regulatory Affairs** evaluating Health Canada DEL pathway for the first time
4. **Procurement lead / WHO prequalification sponsor** at an NGO or donor-funded program

## Commercial intent

Gated lead magnet. Download requires name + work email + company + role + use case. Email capture routes to Resend audience `whitepaper-canadian-cdmo-operating-model` (audience id finalized at Prompt 15) and triggers a 3-email nurture (day 0 / day 3 / day 10) ending in a Cal.com 15-minute discovery invitation.

## Outline as shipped (10 pages)

1. **Cover** — title, subtitle, brand bar, "Inside" bullet preview
2. **Executive summary** (1 page)
3. **Why this guide exists** (1 page) — three CDMO archetypes sponsors choose between, where Propharmex sits
4. **The DEL site** (1 page) — regulatory authority, release, 3PL; primary-source callout to Health Canada DEL register
5. **The development centre** (1 page) — analytical depth, seven dosage forms, WHO-GMP alignment; primary-source callout to ICH guidelines
6. **One quality system, end to end** (1 page) — what "anchored at the DEL" means at the operational level; primary-source callouts to ICH Q10 + Health Canada GUI-0002
7. **How an engagement actually flows** (1 page) — five-stage worked example: scope → development → tech-transfer → manufacture/release → filing
8. **Where the operational seams are** (1 page) — honest accounting of timezone, customs, editorial split
9. **Decision framework** (1 page) — when this model is the right answer, when it isn't, three questions to ask any CDMO partner
10. **Talk to the team** (1 page) — CTA, primary-sources list, YMYL disclaimer

## Source inputs

- `docs/regulatory-lexicon.md` — term consistency (DEL, license, alignment vs confirmation)
- `docs/positioning-canadian-anchor.md` — voice contract, Section 4 QMS-scope paragraph, Section 5 service-execution copy, Section 6 banned-phrase table
- Health Canada Drug Product Database — DEL verification primary source
- Health Canada GUI-0002 — DEL inspection framework
- USFDA 21 CFR Part 314 — ANDA / NDA filing reference
- ICH Q2(R2), Q10, Q1A(R2), Q1B — analytical and quality framework
- WHO TRS Annex 2 — WHO-GMP

## Tone + voice

- Audience: technical regulatory + CMC + manufacturing leaders
- Reading level: assumes comfort with cGMP, ICH, CTD Module 3 terminology
- Voice rules: `docs/brand-voice.md` — expert, credible, humble, anti-hype
- Every regulatory claim cites a primary source with "as of [date]" stamp
- Banned-phrase compliance per `docs/positioning-canadian-anchor.md` Section 6

## Visuals

- Cover: navy header band with brand bar, title in white-on-navy, subtitle in muted blue, "Inside" bullet block on the body half
- Section headers: eyebrow + h1 + subtitle + thin geometric divider
- Primary-source callouts: warm-paper background with a thin primary-color border
- Stage list (page 7): label-and-body two-column layout
- Monochrome + single primary accent — prints cleanly B&W

## Distribution channels

- `/insights/whitepapers/canadian-cdmo-operating-model` gated landing page (current slug)
- 301 redirects from `/whitepapers/canada-india-playbook` and `/insights/whitepapers/two-hub-operating-model` (legacy)
- Email nurture (Resend)
- Enterprise outbound sequences (Apollo MCP)
- Conference giveaway asset (PDAC, AAPS, CPhI)

## How to regenerate

```
pnpm --filter web generate:whitepaper
```

Output: `apps/web/public/downloads/canadian-cdmo-operating-model.pdf`. The script is hand-rolled on `pdf-lib` (no native deps, reproducible across Windows/macOS/Linux). To rewrite copy, edit `apps/web/scripts/generate-whitepaper.mjs` and re-run; the brand-voice gate is a manual lexicon-Section-6 pass before commit.

---

## When this brief is replaced

When the project moves to Sanity, this brief becomes a `whitepaper` document seed. The current frontmatter in `apps/web/content/insights.ts` (whitepaper entry) maps 1:1 to the planned Sanity schema.
